/CAL PROG RPT/X DA ALLOWS DEFENDANT TO WITHDRAW GUILTY PLEA AS TO COUNT 1THE JUDGE VACATES THE PLEA NUNC PRO TUNC FROM 2-23-10/AMEND:2/X:COUNT 2 ISADDED A 653(F)(D)PC MISDEMEANOR/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST &CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL  HEARING ON MOTION TO WITHDRAW GUILTY PLEA,/X  THE DEFENDANT WILL WAVE ALL APPEALS ISSUES RELATED TO THE CRIME LAB AND WITHDRAW HIS MOTION TO WITHDRAW THE GUILTY PLEA,/X: IF DEFENDANT PERFORMS SUCCESSFULLY DURING A PERIOD OF TIME COMPARABLE TO AN 18 MONTH PROBATION PERIOD, THE DA WILL ALLOWTHE WITHDRAWL OF THE GUILTY PLEA TO THE PRESENT CHARGE AND ACCEPT A NEW PLEA TO A MISDEMEANOR CHARGE,/CONTD: PROGRESS REPORT ON DEFENDANT'S CURRENT STATUS/
/CAL: TO SET MOTION TO WITHDRAW PLEA/CTORD: CONFLICT ATTORNEY STUART BLUMSTEIN IS RELIEVED AND DAVID HARRISON IS APPOINTED/CONTD: HEARING ON MOTIONTO WITHDRAW GUILTY PLEA/
